title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Python client and library for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client library for Ollama, allowing Node.js and browser integration.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, enabling local LLM usage within LangChain workflows.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama with ChatGPT-like UI, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for Ollama JavaScript client, providing easy installation for Node.js projects.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package for Ollama Python client, enabling pip installation for Python projects.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot integration for Ollama, allowing users to chat with local LLMs directly in Discord.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced command-line interface for Ollama with additional features and utilities.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Kubernetes Helm charts for deploying Ollama in containerized environments.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images and configurations for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit-based web interface for Ollama with interactive chat and model exploration features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust client library for Ollama, providing native Rust integration with local LLMs.

title: ollama-go
summary: Go client library for Ollama with idiomatic Go APIs and concurrent support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama, enabling local LLM usage in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like extension using Ollama for local code completion and assistance.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official collection of model definitions and configurations for Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, enabling team collaboration with local LLMs.
